scripts.build: npm run clean:build && cd packages/store && npx prisma generate && cd ../.. && tsc -b && cp -r packages/store/src/generated packages/store/dist/
scripts.test: npm run build && export $(cat .env | xargs) && DATABASE_URL=$DATABASE_URL_TEST node --import tsx --test apps/agent/test/*.test.ts apps/cli/test/*.test.ts apps/web/test/*.test.ts
scripts.dev:studio: export $(cat .env | xargs) && cd packages/store && npx prisma studio
